cmdDescrp: Manage scheduled events for your server.

setup.enableSuccess: Scheduled events system has been enabled.
setup.disableSuccess: Scheduled events system has been disabled.
setup.alreadyEnabled: Scheduled events system is already enabled.
setup.alreadyDisabled: Scheduled events system is already disabled.
setup.defaultReminderSet: Default reminder time set to {0} minutes before events.
setup.notConfigured: Scheduled events are not configured. Run `/event setup enable` first.

create.invalidStart: Invalid start time. Please use the format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM (e.g., 2026-03-20 3:00 PM).
create.startInPast: Start time must be in the future.
create.invalidDuration: Duration must be between 1 and 1440 minutes (24 hours).
create.missingChannel: A voice or stage channel is required for non-external events.
create.permissionError: The bot does not have permission to create events in this server.
create.reminderSet: A reminder has been set for {0} minutes before the event.

fromTemplate.templateNotFound: Template not found. Use `/event template list` to see available templates.
fromTemplate.error: Failed to create event from template.

cancel.notFound: Event not found or already ended.
cancel.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel the event **{0}**?

remind.alreadyPast: Cannot set a reminder for an event that has already started.
remind.invalidMinutes: Reminder time must be between 1 and 10080 minutes (7 days).

create.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of event templates (25).
create.duplicate: A template with that name already exists.
create.invalidName: Template name must be lowercase, start with a letter or number, and contain only letters, numbers, and hyphens.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete template **{0}**?

list.title: Event Templates
list.empty: No event templates found. Create one with `/event template create`.

recurring.success: Recurring event created from template **{0}** ({1}). Next occurrence: {2}.
recurring.templateNotFound: Template not found. Use `/event template list` to see available templates.
recurring.templateNotRecurring: This template is not configured as recurring. Edit it first with `/event template edit`.

reminder.channelNotFound: Reminder channel not found, skipping reminder.

builder.cmdDescrp: Manage scheduled events for your server.

create.title: Event title
create.channel: Voice or stage channel for the event

fromTemplate.descrp: Create an event from a saved template.

remind.descrp: Set a reminder for a scheduled event.
remind.minutes: Minutes before event to send reminder

setup.reminderChannel: Set the channel for event reminders
setup.summaryChannel: Set the channel for post-event summaries
setup.defaultReminder: Set default reminder time (minutes before event)

recurring.descrp: Create a recurring event from a template.
recurring.start: Start time for first occurrence (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM AM/PM)

errors.notEnabled: Scheduled events are not enabled. Run `/event setup enable` first.
errors.noPermission: You need Administrator permissions to manage events.
errors.generic: An error occurred while processing the event command.
